title: Point Blank - Ferret's YonKaGor Speckle Plushie
description: Adds a YonKaGor plushie. That does nothing. To a gun mod.
body:
This content pack adds the YonKaGor Speckle Plushie to Vic's Point Blank, because why shoot enemies when you can craft friends! Does absolutely nothing useful!

<details>
<summary>Based on the Makeship plushie of the character featured in Memory Merge</summary>
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/lgzCxqQUU5g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</details>

Features:
- Speckle plushie!
- Three whole animations! (Equip, Squeak, Play Voiceline)
- Squeaky toy noises!
- Toy Voice Box with a whopping four (4) voicelines!

(Does not include: several thousand yards of red yarn, trauma-based forgetfullness, fish)

Notes:
- Squeak with fire (by default Mouse 1)
- Play voiceline with inspect (by default I)
- To install:
  - Install Vic's Point Blank
  - In your instance folder, create a folder called "pointblank"
  - Drag this pack's zip file into that folder

This mod is based on a product by Makeship, which is itself based on a character owned by Yontan "YonKaGor" Yudistira. This mod additionally samples very brief portions of the song "Memory Merge" created by YonKaGor, which have been edited. This mod will be taken down if requested by either YonKaGor or Makeship. This mod has no commercial intent; it is purely made out of love for YonKaGor's content.
